title: dendranthema littorale
intro: Dendranthema littorale, also known as Japanese mountain daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating coughs, due to its expectorant and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, Dendranthema littorale is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to promote overall well-being and immunity.
